turns.content:
You are a subagent: gsd-planner. Create executable PLAN.md files for Phase 24.1 - Agent Hierarchy Restructure.

## MANDATORY READS FIRST
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.planning/phases/24.1-agent-hierarchy-restructure/24-CONTEXT.md
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.planning/phases/24.1-agent-hierarchy-restructure/24.1-RESEARCH.md
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.opencode/agents/ (read a few existing hm-*.md files for format reference)
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.opencode/command/gsd-*.md (read a few command files for format reference)

## CRITICAL CONSTRAINT
- CREATE NEW agent files - do NOT overwrite existing agents in .opencode/agents/
- Existing agents will be archived AFTER this phase
- All new hm-* agent files go to .opencode/agents/
- New hm-* command files go to .opencode/command/
- New hm-* workflow files go to .opencode/workflows/

## Phase Goal
Implement the first 8 core hm-* agents (L2 specialists) with correct OpenCode YAML frontmatter:
- mode: all
- hidden: true  
- description only - NO tools/permissions/temperature/steps/color

## Agent Format (VALIDATED from opencode.ai/docs/agents)
```yaml
---
description: >
  [One sentence role. One sentence artifact produced. One sentence spawn condition.]
mode: all
hidden: true
---
```

## Plans to Create

Write PLAN.md files to: /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.planning/phases/24.1-agent-hierarchy-restructure/

### Plan 1: 24.1-01-PLAN.md — Create Core Agent Files
Create the first 8 hm-* agent files as NEW files in .opencode/agents/:
1. hm-executor.md - Plan execution specialist
2. hm-verifier.md - Goal-backward verification specialist
3. hm-planner.md - Task breakdown specialist
4. hm-plan-checker.md - Plan quality verification specialist
5. hm-project-researcher.md - Domain ecosystem research specialist
6. hm-phase-researcher.md - Phase implementation research specialist
7. hm-synthesizer.md - Research output synthesis specialist
8. hm-codebase-mapper.md - Codebase exploration specialist

Each agent file should have:
- Correct YAML frontmatter (mode: all, hidden: true)
- Role description: what they do, what artifact they produce
- Execution flow: steps to follow when called
- Deviation rules: how to handle edge cases
- Success criteria: what constitutes completion

### Plan 2: 24.1-02-PLAN.md — Create Command Files
Create 4 hm-* command files as NEW files in .opencode/command/:
1. hm-plan-phase.md - Routes to researcher + planner + plan-checker
2. hm-execute-phase.md - Routes to executor + verifier
3. hm-code-review.md - Routes to code-reviewer + code-fixer
4. hm-debug.md - Routes to debug-session-manager + debugger

Each command should reference the workflow file, not contain inline logic.

### Plan 3: 24.1-03-PLAN.md — Create Workflow Files  
Create 2 hm-* workflow files as NEW files in .opencode/workflows/:
1. hm-plan-phase.md - Research → Pattern Map → Plan → Verify → Iterate
2. hm-execute-phase.md - Wave detection → Parallel execution → Verification → Summary

Write each PLAN.md with:
- YAML frontmatter (phase, plan, wave, depends_on)
- Objective
- Context references (@-linked files)
- Tasks with type, files_modified, acceptance criteria
- Verification criteria
- must_haves for goal-backward verification
Now let me read some existing agent files and command files for format reference, plus the ROADMAP for requirement IDs.
Let me also read the ROADMAP and some command files for format reference.
Now I have all the context needed. Let me create all three PLAN.md files.
